Operation 'lookupIp' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and actionable. Enhanced description specifies input requirements and output fields to improve AI agent understanding of available data and use cases.

data.current_description: Returns geolocation data for the specified IP address.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves geolocation data for a specified IP address. Accepts an IP address parameter and returns comprehensive location information including country, city, coordinates, timezone, ISP, and connection details. Supports both IPv4 and IPv6 addresses.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description lacks detail about what parameters are accepted and what specific geolocation fields are returned. Enhanced description specifies input requirements and output fields to improve AI agent understanding of available data and use cases.

message: Operation 'batchLookupIps' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is adequate but description lacks clarity on input format requirements and output structure. Enhanced description specifies comma-separated format, clarifies that results are returned as an array, details the fields included in each result, and explains the use case for batch operations to help AI agents determine when this operation is appropriate.

data.current_description: Returns geolocation data for multiple comma-separated IP addresses.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves geolocation data for multiple IP addresses in a single request. Accepts comma-separated IP addresses as input and returns an array of geolocation objects containing country, city, coordinates, timezone, ISP, and connection information for each address. Useful for bulk IP geolocation lookups.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description lacks clarity on input format requirements and output structure.
